title: 10 Herbal Tinctures to Help Medication Users Manage Constipation
description: Magnolia officinalis tinctures have been traditionally used to help alleviate constipation. This is because it contains properties that can stimulate bowel movements and improve gut health. The tincture contains constituents like magnolol and honokiol, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, helping to relax the muscles in the digestive tract and improve the movement of food through the intestines.
